_comment: Only 'include' entries are built by CI. Move entries from 'disabled' back to 'include' to re-enable them.

disabled._note: Re-enable when Rocky Linux 9 / RHEL 9 support is needed
Re-enable when general (non-pipeline) CASA 6.7.3 rh8 image is needed
Re-enable when general (non-pipeline) CASA 6.7.3 rh9 image is needed
Re-enable when general CASA 6.6.5 rh8 image is needed
Re-enable when general CASA 6.6.5 rh9 image is needed
Previous ALMA pipeline release; re-enable if still required
CASA dev build 6.7.3-21 on el9; move to include to enable

disabled._TODO: rh8 (UBI8/RHEL8) image creation is temporarily excluded (2026-04-21). To re-enable, move the three entries below back into 'include'.

disabled._note: Temporarily excluded: re-enable rh8 base image when rh8 support is resumed
Temporarily excluded: re-enable rh8 ALMA pipeline 6.7.3-20 image when rh8 support is resumed
Temporarily excluded: re-enable rh8 dev 6.7.3-21 image when rh8 support is resumed
